title: STAR - Cognizant Contract Intelligence Pipeline
content:
Project: Cognizant Contract Intelligence and Legal NLP Pipeline

Situation:
- Legal and contract review workflows were highly manual and time-intensive in enterprise settings.
- Document variety and clause complexity made standard automation approaches insufficient.

Task:
- Build an end-to-end NLP workflow for entity extraction, classification, clause identification, and summarization in production.

Action:
- Developed domain-focused extraction and classification pipeline components for contract text.
- Combined model-based extraction with workflow-oriented validation and integration practices.
- Iterated based on dataset and feature-quality constraints rather than only model complexity.
- Delivered with production API and reliability expectations suitable for enterprise use.

Result:
- Source-reported reduction in manual legal review effort and improved processing consistency.
- Strengthened progression from implementation support to project ownership and leadership.
